description: Intent-only request: classify reasoning-driven paper research, tolerant of either anchor.

conversation.text: Research agent that finds recent papers on a topic, reads abstracts, decides which are worth summarizing, and compiles a report.

processExpectations: The agent explains that the reasoning-driven selection of which papers are worth summarizing creates legitimate anchor ambiguity, even though the final report compilation is deterministic.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before classifying the request.
